personal.name: Lovish Sharma
personal.title: Full-stack engineer
personal.subtitle: Software engineer building scalable web platforms at Microchip, India.
bio: I'm Lovish — a full-stack engineer based in Bangalore. At Microchip, I work on the search and discovery surfaces of microchip.com, where I lifted relevancy by 22% and built admin tooling in Vue.js + .NET that keeps the product catalog moving.

I care about systems that hold up under load, interfaces that don't waste a click, and writing the kind of code the next person on the team is happy to inherit. Outside work I tinker with side projects — recently a Spotify-to-YouTube playlist converter and a multi-country SaaS invoice platform.

projects.title: SoundSwap
projects.description: Full-stack converter that turns Spotify playlists into YouTube Music with OAuth-backed cross-platform login, Express + MongoDB APIs for storage and track mapping, and a Tailwind UI for a clean responsive flow.

projects.title: Invixy
projects.description: SaaS invoice management platform with multi-country tax logic (India, Canada, US). NextAuth role-based access lets owners, accountants, and employees manage invoices, clients, and products from dedicated dashboards.

projects.title: Daunku
projects.description: Frontend showcase for a furniture brand — responsive layouts, motion choreography, and a product gallery built without a backend.

description: Lifted site-search relevancy by 22% by integrating Lucidworks Fusion, .NET APIs, and SQL Server, with a sharp drop in null-result queries.
Built and maintained admin applications in Vue.js, .NET, MongoDB, and SQL Server that streamline product-data management across categories.
Ideated and shipped TreeLink — a Vue.js + .NET app for creating and visualizing hierarchical product-category trees, improving catalog organization and discoverability.
Wrote PowerShell automation that replaced manual data-insertion processes across product systems.
Built a search-analytics dashboard surfacing query trends and zero-result rates as actionable insights.
Closed bugs across frontend and backend modules, tightening stability, usability, and load times.

now.building: TreeLink — hierarchical category trees in Vue.js + .NET

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: Working on something that needs a careful pair of hands? Tell me about it.
